title: ONDA Lab website
text:
Lab
  

  
  
Welcome to the website of the ONDA Lab (Open methodologies in Neurorehabilitation and Data Analysis)
The Lab is located at IRCCS San Camillo in Venice its research focuses on Neurorehabilitation and in particular on: Neurophysiology, Neuropsychology, and Neuroscience.


The Lab philosophy is focused on rigour and Open Science principles. We are committed to sharing our code, methods, data, results but also teaching materials and educational resources to the scientific community, to promote transparency, reproducibility and collaboration in research.




We develop open tools for neuropsychological assessment and rehabilitation
We study brain functions and biomarkers using MEEG
We create open-source pipelines for neural data analysis
We develop/optimize methods for behavioural and brain data analysis
